calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-05-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES ON WED., DEC-05-2012: 10:49 AM: PLAINTIFF MARIA LUCANA APPEARS IN PRO PER ON HER OWN BEHALF; DEFENDANT MR. ANGEL MARINO, DBA A-PLUMBING, ALSO APPEARS IN PRO PER ON HIS OWN BEHALF. THE CLERK ADMINISTERS THE OATH; THE COURT HEARS ALL STATEMENTS PRESENTED BY BOTH SIDES IN THIS CAUSE AND RECEIVES AND REVIEWS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS ONE AND TWO, BOTH MARKED SEPARATELY BY THE CLERK. 11:06 AM: COURT THEN TAKES UP DEFENDANT MARINO'S CASE, HEARS ORAL TESTIMONY PRESENTED BY DEF.ANGEL MARINO UNTIL 11:15 A.M.

AFTER HEARING ALL STATEMENTS AND DISCUSSION PRESENTED BY BOTH SIDES, AND AFTER RECEIVING AND REVIEWING ALL DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE PROVIDED, THE COURT THEREUPON TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION.

JUDGE PRO TEM JASON JUNGREIS; CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (D-525).

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Oct-15-2012 Judgment Entered
